title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at StayVista - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at StayVista - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
StayVista invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StayVista:
StayVista is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StayVista!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
